senses.gloss: maddah (Arabic diacritic placed over alif, indicating a glottal stop followed by a long vowel)
during, within, in the course of

examples.text: فَأَسْرَعَ جُحَا إِلَى حِذَائِهِ... لَبِسَهُ... وَمَشَى مُدَّةَ سَاعَتَيْنِ... ثُمَّ جَلَسَ وَحِيدًا بَعْدَ أَنْ تَعِبَ مِنْ الْمَشْيِ...
examples.english: So Joha hurried to his shoes... put them on... walked for two hours... then he sat alone after he got tired of walking...
